description: Career track taxonomy for British colonial administration, derived from Colonial Office Lists 1867-1966

career_tracks.name: Administrative
career_tracks.description: General colonial administration: governors, colonial secretaries, district officers, cadets, clerks (when not department-specific)

career_tracks.name: Legal
career_tracks.description: Judicial and legal: chief justices, judges, attorneys-general, solicitors, registrars, magistrates, sheriffs, coroners

career_tracks.name: Medical
career_tracks.description: Medical and health: colonial surgeons, medical officers, dispensers, health officers, nurses

career_tracks.name: Financial
career_tracks.description: Treasury, revenue, and customs: treasurers, auditors, collectors, accountants, customs officers

career_tracks.name: Engineering
career_tracks.description: Public works, railways, harbours, water supply: engineers, harbour masters, railway managers

career_tracks.name: Survey
career_tracks.description: Land survey, cartography, and crown lands: surveyors-general, land commissioners, district surveyors

career_tracks.name: Police
career_tracks.description: Police, prisons, and constabulary: inspectors-general of police, constables, gaolers, prison wardens

career_tracks.name: Ecclesiastical
career_tracks.description: Church and religious establishment: bishops, archdeacons, chaplains, clergy, curates

career_tracks.name: Education
career_tracks.description: Education and public instruction: directors of education, inspectors of schools, schoolmasters, professors

career_tracks.name: Military
career_tracks.description: Military and defence: garrison commanders, WAFF/KAR officers, commandants, military secretaries

career_tracks.name: Postal
career_tracks.description: Post and telegraph: postmasters-general, telegraph operators, postal clerks

career_tracks.name: Agricultural
career_tracks.description: Agriculture, forestry, veterinary, and botanic: directors of agriculture, conservators of forests, veterinary officers
